segments.text: That doesn't really give him many options, because if he just tries anything,
Light can just, you know, go for a defensive option.
So, right now he's going for him.
All the way down, not even Fox coming.

full_text: That doesn't really give him many options, because if he just tries anything, Light can just, you know, go for a defensive option. So, right now he's going for him. All the way down, not even Fox coming.
